rationale: Both papers centrally study advertising spillovers in paid/online search contexts: the citing paper claims to extend prior spillover/ad-response work with causal field experiments, while the cited paper develops a spillover model from generic to branded search with awareness carryover dynamics. Given this strong topical and mechanism overlap (spillover, carryover/decay, advertiser returns), the citation is plausibly foundational/theoretical rather than a casual mention.
